svg.text: Three independent panels — all always mounted, toggled by tab selection
File picker or paste — loads text from disk,
Guide line at 38% viewport marks reading position.
Streams text to backend in 3-paragraph chunks.
Plays audio as chunks arrive; scroll syncs
Speed slider controls audio and scroll live.
Speak from cursor or guide line position.
Load the text to practise pronouncing
microphone input, and audio output device.
Streams mic audio to backend in real time.
Live audio level meter. Mic hot-swap.
Compares transcription vs reference word by word
using LCS algorithm. Highlights matched, extra,
and missing words in distinct colours.
Click any missed/extra word to hear correct
pronunciation via TTS in the session language.
Choose language, Whisper model, and mic.
Same options as Tutor; no reference needed.
protocol as Tutor). Partial results shown
in italic while listening. Final text appended
Audio device picker · TTS playback helper · File picker · Audio level meter · Visual components (scan-lines, vignette, guide line)
Used by all three panels — single implementation, consistent behaviour
DEV — browser talks to backend via proxy on localhost:8000
PROD — backend serves the built frontend directly (single container)
FastAPI · runs locally or in Docker
Lists all available neural TTS voices
Converts text to audio via Azure Neural TTS.
as they arrive for low-latency playback.
Request is cancellable at any time.
Receives streaming audio chunks over WebSocket
from Tutor or Free Speech panels.
Decodes webm/opus via ffmpeg → 16 kHz PCM,
Partial on silence; final transcribes only the
delta PCM since last partial (low-latency stop).
Whisper models are loaded once and
